items.title: Motivational Monday Minute: Episode 40
items.description:
In this week’s Motivational Monday Minute, CH (Lt. Col.) Corwin L. Smith, Acting Command Chaplain for the District of Columbia National Guard, reminds us that our thoughts and emotions should not dictate our immediate response. Whether facing stress, disappointment, frustration or uncertainty, take a moment to conduct a mental check before reacting. Clarity comes when we pause, reflect and choose our response with purpose rather than emotion.

Don't be driven to react. Think first. Then respond ...

items.title: Remembering Greece's Enduring Legacy in Korea
items.description: Following the outbreak of the Korean War, Greece answered the United Nations' call by deploying the 13th Hellenic Air Force Flight and the Sparta Battalion. Nearly 5,000 Greek service members served with distinction, earning numerous honors through exceptional courage and sacrifice while helping defend the Republic of Korea and strengthen an enduring partnership.

This achievement highlights a decade long joint training partnership between the two navies, significantly enhancing RSNF's operational readiness and regional maritime security.

items.title: Army & Air Force Exchange Service Connects Veterans to Careers on National Hire a Veteran Day
items.description: On July 25, nearly 120 PXs, BXs and distribution centers worldwide will host hiring events for National Hire a Veteran Day, offering on-the-spot interviews and career opportunities. Veterans and transitioning service members can also access resume help, interview prep and skills translation support in the days leading up to the event. Learn more and find an event near you at https://www.shopmyexchange.com/hire-a-veteran Read more: https://wp.me/p9Q7PG-3gk

items.title: Coast Guard welcomes two cutters to new Virginia home port
items.description:
PORTSMOUTH, Va. — The Coast Guard welcomed the crews of the Coast Guard cutters Venturous (WMEC 625) and Resolute (WMEC 620) to their new home port at Coast Guard Base Portsmouth this week.

Both 210-foot Reliance-class medium endurance cutters relocated to Virginia after previously being homeported in St. Petersburg, Florida. The transition brings approximately 154 Coast Guard personnel and their families to the Hampton Roads area.

items.title: From Camouflage to Scrubs
items.description: While most soldiers use their downtime to recharge, U.S. Army Staff Sgt. Kirsten Confer redefines military readiness by stepping straight into another frontline. Trading her camouflage for hospital scrubs, the Citizen-Soldier spends her free hours in the neonatal intensive care unit at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center in Bethesda, Maryland. items.title: NAMRU EURAFCENT Manuscript Published in Medical and Veterinary Entomology
items.description: In late May, Naval Medical Research Unit (NAMRU) EURAFCENT researchers and partners in Tunisia published a study in the journal Medical and Veterinary Entomology , identifying key locations and seasonal patterns of the invasive mosquito Aedes albopictus, a vector associated with diseases such as dengue.
